name: l2_actuator_disk_calibration
value: Aerodynamics4McL2ActuatorDiskCalibration maps rotor thrust states and open rotor-disk aperture area into momentum-theory pressure jump induced velocity wake velocity and power estimates.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 actuator disk load packet.

name: l2_rotor_disk_aperture
value: Aerodynamics4McL2RotorDiskAperture supplies open actuator-disk area and edgewise or axial inlet splits after static airframe blockage.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 actuator disk load packet.

name: l2_drone_probe
value: Aerodynamics4McL2DroneProbe supplies the static airframe solid mask and bounded L2 wind-tunnel request envelope used before powered source terms are fitted.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 actuator disk load packet.

name: drone_config_rotors
value: DroneConfig and RotorSpec provide mass gravity rotor radius maximum thrust thrust coefficient and blade chord used by the load matrix.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 actuator disk load packet.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future force moment validation and possible porous actuator disk source-term integration.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 actuator disk load packet.

name: momentum_theory_open_disk_source
value: Use rotor thrust over open aperture area as pressure jump and ideal actuator-disk momentum theory for induced velocity far wake velocity and momentum power until A4MC exposes a dedicated powered-rotor or porous-disk L2 source term.
note: Load packet is a guardrail before integrating live A4MC powered rotor source terms.
